# bitbucketdc_user (Data Source)

Reads an existing Bitbucket Data Center user by slug (username).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "bitbucketdc_user" "alice" {
  slug = "alice"
}

output "display_name" {
  value = data.bitbucketdc_user.alice.display_name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `slug` (String) The username / slug of the user to look up.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the user account is active.
- `display_name` (String) The full display name of the user.
- `email_address` (String) The email address of the user.
- `id` (String) The user slug (same as slug).
- `name` (String) The login name of the user.
